codeRequiredBody: Please enter the code from your email.
couldNotLoadSessionBody: Could not load your session. Please try again.
enterCodeSentToEmail: Enter the code we sent to {{email}}
useEmailToSignInOrCreate: Use your email to sign in or create your account.
checkInboxForKindRideCode: Check your inbox for the code from KindRide.
oneEmailFlowBody: If your email is new, we'll help you finish setup after verification. If you already have an account, you'll go straight in.
signInTermsNotice: By signing in you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
consentRequiredBody: Please accept the safety recording disclosure to continue.
completeSetupBody: Before entering KindRide, please confirm the safety recording disclosure.
safetyRecordingConsentBody: KindRide records in-app sessions for passenger and driver safety. Recordings are stored securely and auto-deleted after 72 hours unless flagged for review.
scanningDriversSubtitle: We are finding nearby drivers heading toward your destination.
liveNoDriversHint: We recheck quietly about every ten minutes while you stay on this screen (we pause when you switch apps to save battery). If nothing changes, try again later, adjust your destination, or — when offered — allow a multi-leg handoff.
noDriversHint: Please wait a moment and try searching again.
backgroundPausedText: Automatic background search is off until you tap below — saves battery when no drivers show up for a while.
driverDashboardSubtitle: Turn on availability and location so passengers can match your heading and distance. Heading updates when you move.
driverInactiveHint: When on, KindRide syncs your GPS and travel heading to Supabase for live matching.
driverIncomingExplainer: When a passenger requests you, a card appears here (and push works in production builds). You do not need to type the ride id.
driverTapToReview: Tap to review · Accept or decline
driverRatePassengerReady: Trip completed — you can rate this passenger.
driverRatePassengerWaiting: When the passenger ends the trip, the Rate button will appear here (or use manual entry below).
rideShareHint: Ride id for this session (share or show QR to your driver):
rideQrCaption: Driver can scan this — no typing
driverSignInPrompt: Sign in to broadcast your presence to passengers.
driverSupabaseRequired: Supabase is not configured in this build.
driverLocationDenied: Location permission is required to appear in passenger search.
enableLocationToEstimateRoute: Enable location to estimate road-route miles.
matchingFeedLive: Drivers from live search (GPS + route heading).
matchingFeedDemoNoOrigin: Demo list — enable location and pick a destination for live matching.
matchingFeedFallback: Network or server issue — showing embedded demo list.
searchAgainPaused: Automatic checks paused to save battery. Tap 'Search again now' to retry.
locationNeededBody: Turn on location so we can attach this ride request to GPS (required for the formal driver-accept flow).
allowLocationSavePickup: Allow location to save pickup. You can still enter miles by hand.
allowLocationEstimateMiles: Allow location to estimate miles from GPS, or type miles manually.
shareTripNoRideId: No ride id available to share.
shareTripBackendNotConfigured: Backend is not configured for ride sharing.
rideSessionNotes: Did you run supabase/rides_lifecycle.sql (nullable driver_id + new statuses)?
requestFailedRetryTip: Tip: wait a few seconds and try again, or pull to refresh the list.
startSearchUrlMissing: Cannot start ride: backend is not configured.
requestDriverUrlMissing: Cannot request driver: backend is not configured.
noResponseThenTryNext: No response from {{name}}; trying next driver...
noDriverAccepted: Could not get acceptance from any driver; try again.
noResponseInTimeHint: The request expired (~1 min) or was reset. Push alerts often do not work in Expo Go — the driver should open Incoming ride in the app (same ride id) or try again.
destinationRequiredBody: Pick your destination pin first so the app can match route direction.
multiLegHandoffBody: We can’t find a full A→B driver right now. As a last resort, we can break your trip into multiple legs and keep searching for the next driver while you ride with Driver A.
heading: Heading
pointsApiMissing: Points API URL missing in app env — cannot search.
backgroundCheckFailed: Background check failed ({{status}}). Pull to refresh or try again later.
invalidServerResponse: Invalid response from server. Try again or check backend logs.
couldNotReadSearchResults: Could not read search results. Will try again.
expoPushHint: Expo Go / Android: push may not fire — use a dev build for notifications.
retryRequestRide: Or try Request Ride again after the driver is ready.
destinationRequiredBody: Pick your destination pin first so the app can match route direction.
multiLegHandoffIntro: We can’t find a full A→B driver right now.
multiLegHandoffBody: As a last resort, we can break your trip into multiple legs and keep searching for the next driver while you ride with Driver A.
multiLegRatingHint: Multi-leg trip (leg {{legIndex}}). Continue to your next driver, or confirm you have arrived.
continueTripSkipRating: Continue trip with next driver (skip rating)
ratingRecordedThanks: Thanks! Your rating has been recorded.
fallbackUnauthorizedMessage: You are not signed in on this device. Points are local only. Sign in on the Points tab to sync with backend.
fallbackNetworkMessage: Backend is temporarily unavailable. Points shown are local fallback.
signInToContinueJourneyBody: Sign in as the passenger to continue this journey.
signInToEndJourneyBody: Sign in to end this journey on the server.
signInToFindNextDriverBody: Sign in as the passenger to find the next driver.
signInToLoadLivePoints: Sign in to load live points
starterLocalPointsScreen: Starter local points screen (no database yet)
fallbackUnauthorizedNotice: You are not signed in on this device. Points shown may be local only until you sign in.
fallbackNetworkNotice: Backend was unavailable during your last submit. Local fallback was used.
signInPromptHint: Same Supabase account for passengers (ride requests) and drivers (points). No separate “driver app” — use two phones with two different emails. New here? Create an account below.
signInToLoad: Sign In to Load Live Points
driverOnlyArea: This area is driver-only. Passenger accounts do not collect points.
areYouSureSignOut: Are you sure you want to sign out?
settingsIntro: Control how KindRide suggests multi-leg trips when one driver may not cover your full route.
testingAccountHint1: In Supabase, this UUID is auth.users.id. Use the same value in driver_presence.driver_id so this phone appears in live matching.
testingAccountHint2: Row must also use the same cardinal as the passenger screen (e.g. if Ride Request says heading West, set heading_direction = west), stay within ~5 km of the passenger, is_available = true, and keep updated_at fresh (stale rows are ignored after ~10 minutes).
driverNotShowingTitle: Driver not showing in live search?
driverNotShowingHint: Sign in on this device first — then your Supabase user id appears above. That id must match driver_presence.driver_id for you to appear as a driver. Heading, distance, and fresh presence must match what Ride Request uses (see signed-in notes).
allowMultiLegHint: When off, trips always stay single-leg in the app (no handoff search). You can change this anytime.
considerMultiLegSoonerHint: Off (recommended): only when no matching “already heading your way” driver exists and the trip is long. On: use the earlier per-driver check (more handoffs for long or detour rides).
liveMapsHint: Live maps run on iOS/Android builds. On web, use GPS buttons below or enter miles manually.
addGoogleMapsKeyHint: Add EXPO_PUBLIC_GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY for Google tiles on device builds.
nextDriverFound: Next driver found: {{name}} · ETA {{eta}} mins (meeting point C)
searchingNextDriver: Searching for your next driver while you ride…
passengerReputation: Passenger community score: {{score}} · from {{count}} driver rating{{s}}
passengerProfileNoRatings: Passenger profile: no ratings yet (or sign in to load).
detourHint: Zero/low detour (driver was already heading this way) affects the points multiplier.
minimalDetour: Minimal detour / already going this way
locationOffOrDenied: Location off or denied — type miles manually, or enable location in settings.
pickupSavedFromGps: Pickup saved from GPS. At your drop-off, tap “Set drop-off from GPS” below.
couldNotReadPickupGps: Could not read pickup GPS — use the button to retry or type miles.
pickupUpdatedFromGps: Pickup updated from GPS. At drop-off, use “Set drop-off from GPS”.
gpsErrorSavingPickup: GPS error saving pickup — try again or type miles.
savePickupFromGpsFirst: Save pickup from GPS first (or tap retry below).
straightLineGps: Straight-line GPS ≈ {{miles}} mi (roads are often longer — edit the field if needed).
backendMissingEndpoint: EXPO_PUBLIC_POINTS_API_URL is missing, so we cannot mark the ride as completed.
enterMilesWarning: Enter miles for this leg only: a number from 0.1 to 500 (e.g. 2.2).
signInOnPointsTab: If you see 401, sign in on the Points tab before testing.
enterRideIdAlertBody: Please enter the ride ID to rate the passenger.
signInDriverLoadDetails: Sign in as the driver before loading ride details.
rideNotCompletedBody: This ride is not completed yet. You can only rate passengers for completed rides.
noPassengerBody: This ride has no passenger to rate.
signInDriverSubmit: Sign in as the driver before submitting.
enterRideIdSubtitle: Enter the ride ID to rate the passenger after a completed trip.
rideIdPlaceholder: Ride ID (e.g., from passenger or trip history)
passengerFeedbackSubtitle: Your feedback stays with KindRide for trust and safety. Optional comment below.
longWaitBody: We've been searching for 15 minutes. Consider adjusting your destination or enabling multi-leg handoffs to increase your chances of finding a ride.
searchExpandedBody: We haven't found a match nearby yet, so we've automatically expanded the search radius to 15km.
missingJourneyDetails: Missing journey details. Open Ride Request to start a trip.
matchingDriversHeading: We are matching drivers heading toward your destination direction.
signInToLoadRide: Sign in to load this ride. Use the same driver account the passenger selected.
backendOrSignInNotConfigured: Backend or sign-in is not configured.
signInAsDriverReceivedRequest: Sign in as the driver account that received this request.
passengerNotifiedRouting: The passenger has been notified. Routing you to the Active Trip map.
pasteRideId: Paste the ride id from the passenger screen.
preferDriverTab:
Prefer the Driver tab: when a passenger requests you, a card appears there—no typing needed.

Or scan the passenger's QR on their Ride Request screen. Use manual entry only as a fallback. Do not paste kindride://… into Google Search.
rideIdCopyIfNeed: Ride id (copy if you need it)
requestNoLongerPending: This request is no longer pending (declined or timed out).
noPendingDriverAction: No pending driver action for this ride.
rideStatusWait: Ride status is '{{status}}'. Please wait for the driver to accept this ride before ending.
couldNotStartMultiLeg: Could not start a multi-leg journey.
locationNeededForSos: Location access is needed for SOS functionality.
unableToGetLocationSos: Unable to get your location. SOS may be less effective.
sosSentBody: Emergency services have been notified. Help is on the way.
sosBackendError: Could not reach emergency services backend. Using emergency contact directly.
sosEmergencyFallback: Emergency services notified. If backend unavailable, call 911 directly.
emergencySosSubtitle: Only use this in case of emergency. This will alert emergency services.
updatedStillNoDriversHeading: Updated {{timestamp}} — still no drivers heading {{direction}} within range (or stale presence).
stillNoMatchLastChecked: Still no match — last checked {{timestamp}}. Keeping watch…
longWaitBackgroundNote: We’ve been searching for 15 minutes. Consider adjusting your destination, allowing a multi-leg handoff, or try again later.
backgroundChecksPausedLongStretch: We paused automatic checks to save battery after a longer stretch on this screen. Tap "Search again now" anytime to look for drivers.
multiLegConsentMessage:
We can’t find a full A→B driver right now.

As a last resort, we can break your trip into multiple legs and keep searching for the next driver while you ride with Driver A.

Do you want to allow multi-leg handoffs when needed?
homeStory.s1.name: A student in Austin
homeStory.s1.story: Made it to her 8am final exam on time. Driver was already heading that way — zero detour.
homeStory.s2.name: A nurse in Houston
homeStory.s2.story: Reached the hospital for her night shift. No fare, no surge. Pure community kindness.
homeStory.s3.name: An elder in Atlanta
homeStory.s3.story: Made it to his weekly dialysis. Driver went 12 minutes out of his way. Didn't mention it once.
homeStory.s4.name: A single mum in Dallas
homeStory.s4.story: Kids dropped at school, made it to work on time. First time in weeks she wasn't late.
homeStory.s5.name: A new arrival in Phoenix
homeStory.s5.story: Reached the immigration office for his appointment. His very first KindRide. He cried.
passwordResetSentTo: We sent a password reset link to {{email}}
enterEmailResetLink: Enter your email to receive a reset link
cameraPermissionNeededForQr: We need your permission to show the camera to scan the QR code.
invalidKindrideRideQr: This QR code does not contain a valid KindRide ride ID.
enterShareTokenToViewTrip: Enter the share token from the driver or passenger to view an active trip status.
rideShareHintBody: Tip: call /rides/share-token from the driver or passenger device using the current rideId, then open this screen with that token.
qrProfileShareMessage: Add me on KindRide! Scan my QR code or visit: {{profileUrl}}
scanAnyCameraProfile: Scan with any camera to open this profile
destinationMapPickingMobileOnly: Destination map picking works on iOS/Android builds.
referralShareMessage: Join me on KindRide, a free humanitarian rideshare app! Use my code {{referralCode}} when you sign up, and we'll both get 50 bonus points after your first ride. Download here: https://kindride.org/download
referralSubPrefix: When your friend completes their first ride, you both get
referralCodeHint: Your friend will enter this code during sign-up.
referralStep1: Share your code with a friend.
referralStep2: They sign up and enter your code.
referralStep3: After their first ride, you both get 50 points!
onboarding.slide1.title:
Free rides,
real impact.
onboarding.slide1.body: KindRide connects passengers who need a lift with drivers already heading their way — no fares, no surge pricing, ever.
onboarding.slide2.title:
Kindness is
your currency.
onboarding.slide2.body: Drivers earn Humanitarian Points — non-transferable social capital that grows with every act of generosity.
onboarding.slide3.title:
Safety built
into every ride.
onboarding.slide3.body: Identity checks, in-app session recording (auto-deleted in 72h), one-tap SOS, and live trip sharing — for you and your loved ones.
onboardingAlreadyHaveAccount: Already have an account? Sign in
destinationWebHint: Web picker uses manual lat/lng input so testing doesn’t depend on native map taps.
driverOnTheWay: Your driver is on the way
driverArriveShortlyTrackLive: Your driver will arrive shortly. You can track them live.
driverFunFact1: Knows every shortcut in the city.
driverFunFact2: Has driven over 1,000 kind miles this year.
driverFunFact3: Former community volunteer and still gives back.
driverFunFact4: Favourite route: the scenic riverside road.
driverFunFact5: Hosts a local book club on weekends.
driverFunFact6: Once helped a passenger catch a flight they almost missed.
driverFunFact8: Has a perfect 5-star rating streak this month.
driverFunFact9: Passionate about local music and live events.
driverFunFact10: Drives with a fully verified safety record.
multiLegTripLegHint: Multi-leg trip (leg {{leg}}). Continue to your next driver, or confirm you have arrived.
tipHint: 100% goes to {{driverName}}. Completely optional — drivers never see whether you tipped.
tipSentThanks: Tip sent — thank you for your kindness!
shareRideMessage: I just gave a kind ride on KindRide! 💙 {{stats}} Every ride builds community. Download KindRide and pay it forward!
shareUserIdWithSupport: Share with support if you need help.
signInToAccessFullAccount: Sign in to access your full account
verifyIdForTrustBoost: Verify your ID for trust boost
completeStripeIdentity: Complete Stripe Identity via the web portal or ask your operator.
simplifiedModeSub: Larger text, fewer options — great for all ages
viewFullPrivacyPolicy: View our full policy at kindride.org/privacy.
myQrProfileSub: Share your profile at Hub meetups
kindrideNeverSellsData: KindRide never sells your data. Your location stays on your device until you choose to share a ride.
maximumTierReached: 🏆  Maximum tier reached — you're a Champion!
realImpactScoreSyncs: Your real impact score syncs from the cloud when you're logged in.
cityRankingsComingSoon: City rankings by kind points — coming soon
pointsRedemption.donateToShelterDesc: Give 25 pts to a local shelter
payItForwardSub: Gift a free ride to someone in need using your kind points.
giftRideBody: Use {{points}} pts to gift a ride to someone in your community?
payItForwardLaunchesSoon: Pay It Forward launches in v2. Your generosity is noted! 💙
noActivityYetEarnPoints: No activity yet. Complete your first ride to earn points.
everyRideActOfKindness: Every ride is an act of kindness.
pointsReflectRealImpact: Points reflect your real impact — each one represents a person helped, a mile driven, and a community strengthened.
leaderboardPrivacySub: This week · Lagos · First names only for privacy
adminPrivilegesRequired: You do not have administrator privileges.
leaderboardCtaBody: Complete more rides this week to earn points and appear on the city leaderboard. Resets every Monday.
freeRidesRealImpactEveryTime: Free rides. Real impact. Every time.
